consistency.name_vs_slug: Consistent ('Boots of Striding and Springing' vs 'boots-of-striding-and-springing').

quality.completeness: High. Contains essential fields: slug, name, type, rarity, attunement requirement, and detailed description.
quality.clarity: The description is clear and enumerates the mechanical benefits precisely.
quality.data_integrity: High. The data appears accurate and well-formed.

mechanics.walking_speed: Sets minimum walking speed to 30 feet, unless already higher.
mechanics.encumbrance_heavy_armor: Ignores movement penalties from being encumbered or wearing heavy armor.
mechanics.jumping: Increases jump distance (both long and high, implicitly) to three times the normal distance, limited by remaining movement.

potential_refinements: The description mentions jump distance but does not explicitly state if it affects long jump or high jump (or both), though standard interpretation implies both based on the phrasing 'you can jump'.
The source text snippet indicates a link for attunement ('requires [attunement](#section-attunement)'), which is an external reference not fully captured in the main fields.
